title: Kings of Mulberry Street: Let Love Reign
original_title: Kings of Mulberry Street: Let Love Reign
overview: What if the only way Ticky and Baboo can save Granny Chetty from the clutches of the fallen Commander Veerasamy is by pretending to be celebrities from Bollywood?
